resources.string: Battery optimization, autostart, and background limits
View, export, or clear runtime logs
No entries match the current filter
Why can the connection drop in the background?

PocketRDP uses a foreground service to keep the connection alive in the background. System power-saving policies, especially customized Android builds, may still clear the background process after you switch apps or lock the screen. Add PocketRDP to the allow list below to improve background reliability.
✓ PocketRDP is already allowed through battery optimization. The system should not limit its network or background activity while saving power or the screen is off.
PocketRDP is not allowed yet. Tap the button below and choose Allow in the system dialog so the app can keep the network connected during screen-off or Doze mode.
Enable autostart and background running for PocketRDP in system settings. Suggested steps:

Tip: menu locations vary by system version. If the button above does not jump to the exact page, use Open app info and enter settings manually. Some systems reset these switches after updates, so revisit this page after a disconnect.

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_xiaomi
string-array.item: Settings → Apps → Manage apps → PocketRDP → Autostart: On
Settings → Battery → App battery saver → PocketRDP → Choose No restrictions
In Recents, pull down the PocketRDP card and tap the lock icon to keep it in the background

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_huawei_honor
string-array.item: Settings → Battery → App launch → PocketRDP → Turn off Manage automatically
In manual management, enable Autostart / Secondary launch / Run in background
In Recents, pull down the PocketRDP card and tap the lock icon to keep it in the background

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_oppo_oneplus
string-array.item: Settings → App management → PocketRDP → Battery usage → Allow background activity / autostart
Settings → Battery → More settings → Allow high background battery use for PocketRDP
In Recents, pull down and lock the PocketRDP card

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_vivo
string-array.item: i Manager → App management → Autostart management → Allow PocketRDP autostart
Settings → Battery → High background power usage → Allow PocketRDP
In Recents, pull down and lock the PocketRDP card

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_samsung
string-array.item: Settings → Apps → PocketRDP → Battery → Choose Unrestricted
Settings → Battery → Background usage limits → Remove PocketRDP from sleeping or deep sleeping apps
Turn off Auto disable unused apps / Adaptive battery

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_meizu
string-array.item: Security → Permission management → Background management → Allow PocketRDP to run in background
Settings → Power management → Standby power usage → Allow PocketRDP
Lock PocketRDP in Recents

string-array.name: keepalive_steps_other
string-array.item: Settings → Apps → PocketRDP → Battery → Allow background activity / Unrestricted
If your system has Autostart or Background running switches, enable them for PocketRDP
Lock PocketRDP in Recents if supported so it is not cleared automatically
